name: asks photos (media enabled) → confirm sending + include property ID
rule: Reply should warmly confirm photo sharing (e.g. "Sure! Let me share the photos" or similar). Must NOT say "system will send" or "I cannot send photos". Must NOT push for a visit instead of showing photos. The JSON metadata should ideally include matched_property_id.
raw:
Sure, let me share the photos with you!
{"score":6,"temperature":"warm","intent":"buy","areas":["Baner"],"budget_min":null,"budget_max":null,"timeline":null,"name":"Rahul","stage":"presentation","matched_property_id":"p3","appointment_booked_time":null,"appointment_status":null,"lang":"en"}
reply: Sure, let me share the photos with you!
judgeWhy: PASS - The reply warmly confirms photo sharing and does not include any phrases that are not allowed, such as "system will send", "I cannot send photos", or pushing for a visit instead of showing photos.
